title: Malaxis cordiglottis
taxonomy: Malaxis cordiglottis is classified within the family Orchidaceae. This species belongs to the genus Malaxis, which is a group of orchids commonly known as the "bald hypoxis" or "little orchids". Malaxis cordiglottis is also known by its synonym Malaxis uniflora, and it is native to North America. The species is often found growing in wetlands and along streams. Its classification reflects its unique characteristics and its relationship to other orchid species.
